docs.title: AlphaForge Documentation
docs.text: AlphaForge is a local CLI that unifies time-series backtesting, Bayesian optimization, and walk-forward validation. This documentation walks through installation, strategy development, and integration with AI coding agents.

docs.title: Topics
docs.text:
• Getting Started — Installation and license activation
  • CLI Reference — forge command catalog
  • Strategy Templates — HMM × BB and other example combinations
  • AI Agent Integration — Claude Code / Codex × AlphaForge
  • Legal & Disclaimers — EULA and Privacy Policy

docs.title: AI Agent Integration
docs.text: A workflow for autonomously exploring and optimizing trading strategies by combining AlphaForge with coding agents like Claude Code and Codex.
